1	// Package runtimelint implements the SD-024 Stage 4 structural lint
2	// rule that mechanically forbids the durable-knob fields on *Runtime
3	// structs and the reintroduction of the legacy *Options types.
4	//
5	// Three patterns flagged:
6	//
7	//  1. Forbidden field name on a *Runtime struct declared in
8	//     cli/internal/agent/. Forbidden names are a closed list (see
9	//     forbiddenRuntimeFields below); allowed runtime-intent fields
10	//     such as NoReview, PollInterval, SessionLogDirOverride are not
11	//     on the list. Per TD-024 §Lint rule, only struct types whose
12	//     name ends in "Runtime" are scanned, to avoid false-positives on
13	//     result/status/event types in cli/internal/agent/types.go.
14	//
15	//  2. Composite literal Xxx{...} where Xxx is one of the legacy
16	//     options types (ExecuteBeadLoopOptions, RunOptions,
17	//     ExecuteBeadOptions, CompareOptions, QuorumOptions) anywhere in
18	//     the repository.
19	//
20	//  3. Function declaration in cli/internal/agent/ whose signature
21	//     includes a parameter typed as one of the legacy options types
22	//     named in pattern 2.
23	//
24	// Closed lists are maintained as Go constants — adding a new durable
25	// knob to *Config requires adding its name to forbiddenRuntimeFields.
26	package runtimelint
27	
28	import (
29		"go/ast"
30		"go/token"
31		"go/types"
32		"strings"
33	
34		"golang.org/x/tools/go/analysis"
35		"golang.org/x/tools/go/analysis/passes/inspect"
36		"golang.org/x/tools/go/ast/inspector"
37	)
38	
39	// Analyzer is the SD-024 Stage 4 structural analyzer.
40	var Analyzer = &analysis.Analyzer{
41		Name:     "runtimelint",
42		Doc:      "flags durable-knob fields on *Runtime structs and reintroductions of legacy *Options types per SD-024 §Stage 4 / TD-024 §Lint rule",
43		Requires: []*analysis.Analyzer{inspect.Analyzer},
44		Run:      run,
45	}
46	
47	// forbiddenRuntimeFields is the closed list of durable-knob field
48	// names that must not appear on *Runtime structs declared in
49	// cli/internal/agent/. Maintained as a constant per TD-024 §Lint rule.
50	var forbiddenRuntimeFields = map[string]bool{
51		"Harness":                 true,
52		"Model":                   true,
53		"Provider":                true,
54		"ModelRef":                true,
55		"Profile":                 true,
56		"Effort":                  true,
57		"Permissions":             true,
58		"Timeout":                 true,
59		"WallClock":               true,
60		"ContextBudget":           true,
61		"MinTier":                 true,
62		"MaxTier":                 true,
63		"Assignee":                true,
64		"ReviewMaxRetries":        true,
65		"NoProgressCooldown":      true,
66		"MaxNoChangesBeforeClose": true,
67		"HeartbeatInterval":       true,
68		"SessionLogDir":           true, // durable variant; SessionLogDirOverride is allowed
69		"MirrorCfg":               true,
70		"Models":                  true,
71		"ReasoningLevels":         true,
72		"Endpoints":               true,
73		"ProfileLadders":          true,
74		"ModelOverrides":          true,
75		"PerHarness":              true,
76	}
77	
78	// legacyOptionsTypes is the closed list of legacy options type names
79	// that must not be reintroduced (composite literal) or accepted as a
80	// function parameter in cli/internal/agent/.
81	var legacyOptionsTypes = map[string]bool{
82		"ExecuteBeadLoopOptions": true,
83		"RunOptions":             true,
84		"ExecuteBeadOptions":     true,
85		"CompareOptions":         true,
86		"QuorumOptions":          true,
87	}
88	
89	// agentPkgSuffixes lists the package import-path suffixes considered
90	// the cli/internal/agent/ package for scoping rules 1 and 3.
91	var agentPkgSuffixes = []string{
92		"/internal/agent",
93		"internal/agent",
94		"agent", // permissive: testdata stub uses bare "agent"
95	}
96	
97	func pkgPathHasSuffix(p string, suffixes []string) bool {
98		for _, s := range suffixes {
99			if p == s || strings.HasSuffix(p, s) {
100				return true
101			}
102		}
103		return false
104	}
105	
106	// inAgentPkg reports whether the analyzer pass is operating on a
107	// package whose path is cli/internal/agent/ (or a testdata stub).
108	func inAgentPkg(pass *analysis.Pass) bool {
109		if pass.Pkg == nil {
110			return false
111		}
112		return pkgPathHasSuffix(pass.Pkg.Path(), agentPkgSuffixes)
113	}
114	
115	func run(pass *analysis.Pass) (interface{}, error) {
116		insp := pass.ResultOf[inspect.Analyzer].(*inspector.Inspector)
117	
118		// Skip the analyzer's own package.
119		if pass.Pkg != nil {
120			path := pass.Pkg.Path()
121			if strings.HasSuffix(path, "/tools/lint/runtimelint") ||
122				strings.Contains(path, "/tools/lint/runtimelint/") {
123				return nil, nil
124			}
125		}
126	
127		report := func(pos token.Pos, msg string) {
128			pass.Report(analysis.Diagnostic{Pos: pos, Message: msg})
129		}
130	
131		// Pattern 1: forbidden field on *Runtime struct in agent pkg.
132		if inAgentPkg(pass) {
133			insp.Preorder([]ast.Node{(*ast.TypeSpec)(nil)}, func(n ast.Node) {
134				ts := n.(*ast.TypeSpec)
135				checkRuntimeStruct(ts, report)
136			})
137		}
138	
139		// Pattern 2: composite literal of legacy options type (anywhere).
140		insp.Preorder([]ast.Node{(*ast.CompositeLit)(nil)}, func(n ast.Node) {
141			cl := n.(*ast.CompositeLit)
142			checkLegacyComposite(pass, cl, report)
143		})
144	
145		// Pattern 3: function param typed as legacy options (agent pkg).
146		// Walk only FuncDecl — function-typed values inside the package are
147		// not the surface we care about; the rule targets declared
148		// signatures.
149		if inAgentPkg(pass) {
150			insp.Preorder([]ast.Node{(*ast.FuncDecl)(nil)}, func(n ast.Node) {
151				fd := n.(*ast.FuncDecl)
152				if fd.Type != nil {
153					checkLegacyParam(pass, fd.Type, report)
154				}
155			})
156		}
157	
158		return nil, nil
159	}
160	
161	// --- Pattern 1: forbidden field on *Runtime struct ------------------------
162	
163	func checkRuntimeStruct(ts *ast.TypeSpec, report func(token.Pos, string)) {
164		if ts.Name == nil || !strings.HasSuffix(ts.Name.Name, "Runtime") {
165			return
166		}
167		st, ok := ts.Type.(*ast.StructType)
168		if !ok || st.Fields == nil {
169			return
170		}
171		for _, f := range st.Fields.List {
172			for _, name := range f.Names {
173				if forbiddenRuntimeFields[name.Name] {
174					report(name.Pos(),
175						"runtimelint: forbidden durable-knob field "+name.Name+" on *Runtime struct "+ts.Name.Name+" — durable knobs belong on config.ResolvedConfig, not on the runtime struct (SD-024 §Runtime structs / TD-024 §Lint rule)")
176				}
177			}
178		}
179	}
180	
181	// --- Pattern 2: composite literal of legacy options type ------------------
182	
183	func checkLegacyComposite(pass *analysis.Pass, cl *ast.CompositeLit, report func(token.Pos, string)) {
184		t := pass.TypesInfo.TypeOf(cl)
185		if t == nil {
186			return
187		}
188		if ptr, ok := t.(*types.Pointer); ok {
189			t = ptr.Elem()
190		}
191		named, ok := t.(*types.Named)
192		if !ok {
193			return
194		}
195		obj := named.Obj()
196		if obj == nil {
197			return
198		}
199		if !legacyOptionsTypes[obj.Name()] {
200			return
